reminders.text: Fleet health check: action(type: 'session/list') — verify Workers still active, check for unresponsive sessions (10 min unresponsive = terminate). Scale up if queue non-empty and all Workers busy.

Completed task verification: scan 60-review/ for tasks ready to seal. Read skills/task-engine/verification and skills/task-engine/finalization before proceeding. git mv approved tasks to 70-done/YYYY/MM/DD/, commit with Sealed-By trailer, DM Curator.
Pipeline scan: survey all task stages (40-queued, 50-active, 60-review). Queue empty? DM Curator. Stalled tasks in 50-active? Nudge Workers. Drafts available for promotion? Triage with Curator.

Friction scan: review active Workers for blockers, check for stale worktrees, audit for guidance gaps. File friction items to 10-drafts/ with 'needs Curator review'. DM Curator if blocking fleet velocity.

PR exhaustion check: Run gh pr list across workspace repos. For any PR with pending Copilot review comments, read skills/- GitHub/copilot-exhaustion/SKILL.md and follow the exhaustion loop. DM Curator with PR status.

Worktree cleanup: Scan all workspace repos for stale worktrees belonging to completed tasks. Remove with git worktree remove --force. Delete fully-merged branches with git branch -d. DM Curator with cleanup summary.
